title: Normalize design_system.json from refreshed Stitch baseline
description: design-system-agent re-reads tasks/app-ui-design-system/01-stitch-design-package/artifacts/design_package.json, the refreshed design/stitch/ exports, and the same artifacts/ folder, then publishes or refreshes artifacts/design_system.json with color, typography, spacing, radii, and elevation tokens traceable to the canonical screen[0] baseline; updates design_package.json references per single-writer discipline.
acceptance: All reads and writes for this chain target tasks/app-ui-design-system/01-stitch-design-package/artifacts/ (no competing artifact roots).
artifacts/design_system.json exists with token tables and traceability notes mapping values to the refreshed baseline and canonical screen[0] exports.
artifacts/design_package.json is updated: references.design_system points to the relative path; status reflects post-token workflow; blockers[] lists any token gaps tied to the new exports.
No product application source paths are modified; output stays under the assigned artifacts/ directory.
